title: Tropicraft x Cobblemon
description: This Datapack adds Cobblemon Spawns to the Tropicraft Dimension!
body:
Transform Tropicraft's tropical paradise into a thriving Pokemon ecosystem! This datapack brings 160+ Pokemon to life across sun-soaked beaches, dense rainforests, crystalline oceans, and volcanic peaks. Every biome pulses with carefully selected Pokemon that belong in a tropical setting!

This pack was created for my up-coming Modpack "Cobblemon (RPG)"!

Features:

160+ Pokemon across 8 fully populated biomes
Exclusive fishing spawns in 3 water biomes (Beach, Ocean, River)
Themed encounters - Pokemon match each biome's tropical atmosphere
Starter Pokemon lines - Find Squirtle, Totodile, Mudkip, and more!
Dragon-filled mountains - Tropical Peaks features pseudo-legendaries
Evolution-appropriate spawns - Proper level caps for all Pokemon
Perfect for: Modpack creators, server owners, and players who want a fully-featured Pokemon experience in the Tropicraft dimension!

All the spawns! :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://docs.google.com/document/d/19_eIoO5c5aVHMGgQ9CkQ-m-j16vE9tiowuR9MmnZMrc/edit?usp=sharing

</details>

Installation:

Download the datapack
Place in world/datapacks or Open Loader's/Other datapack loaders data folder
Run /reload
Start exploring!
Requires: Cobblemon 1.6.1+ and Tropicraft mod


Also check out: 

Eternal Starlight x Cobblemon!
Bygone x Cobblemon!

This project can also be found on Curseforge!

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/tropicraft-x-cobblemon
